user.title: Configure Vklass
user.description: Welcome to Vklass. Start by choosing a name for this Vklass device in Home Assistant.

auth.title: Configure Vklass login credentials
auth.description: Add the login information you normally use the authentication URL. If you use BankID QR code login you normally would not enter any information here.

manual_cookie_warning.title: Unsupported authentication URL
manual_cookie_warning.description:
No supported Vklass authentication adapter was found for `{auth_url}`.

You can continue anyway, but then `vklass.set_auth_cookie` must be used manually with the `se.vklass.authentication` cookie value from a logged in browser.

Confirm below to continue with manual cookie handling, or go back and change the authentication URL.

error.name_exists: A Vklass entry with this name already exists.

init.title: Configure Vklass login credentials
init.description: Add the login information you normally use the authentication URL. If you use BankID QR code login you normally would not enter any information here.

options.edit_auth_url: Go back and edit authentication URL
